title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS310-1G-5S-4S+OUT, netFiber 9
description: CRS310-1G-5S-4S + OUT or netFiber 9 is an outdoor optical switch router without a fan , with IP54 certification and a full-fledged RouterOS operating system with L5 license but and SwOS thanks to Dual boot. The switch contains 4x SFP, 5x SFP+, 1x GLAN and one console RJ45 port. The Cloud Router Switch is powered by a single-core ARM v7 processor (98DX226S) clocked at 800 MHz and has 256MB RAM In terms of power supply, the switch can be powered via 2 standard power adapters for redundancy (18 to 57 V) but also via passive PoE (18 to 57 V) or 802.3af/at on the first Ethernet port Device 48V/0.95A power adapter Gigabit PoE injector Metal cable tie Wall plug, screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (5) 1000Mbps + (4) 10Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 18 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector PoE type PoE-In (only) Redundant power supply Yes Power via connector/terminal 18 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP54 Design Outdoor Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 212 Height [mm] 304 Depth [mm] 71 Hardware CPU 98DX226S CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 1 RAM [MB] 256
